title: Web App: Tutorials

actors.name: Web Visitor
actors.description: Browser user navigating the impeccable.style site

use_cases.name: View Tutorials Index
use_cases.description: Web Visitor browses the list of all available tutorial articles
use_cases.precondition: Static HTML pre-generated at server startup via generateSubPages()
main_flow: serveGenerated() checks file existence via Bun file()
Returns pre-built HTML with Content-Type text/html
use_cases.page_content: Tutorial cards: ordered list with slug, title, tagline, arrow link to /tutorials/:slug

use_cases.name: View Tutorial Detail
use_cases.description: Web Visitor reads an individual tutorial article
use_cases.precondition: Slug sanitized via /[^a-z0-9-]/gi replacement; HTML pre-generated
main_flow: server/index.js sanitizes slug param (strips non-alphanumeric/dash chars)
serveGenerated() checks file existence; returns 404 if missing
Returns pre-built HTML with sidebar + article content
use_cases.page_content: Docs layout: sidebar (tutorial list + skills grouped by category) + tutorial article with markdown body rendered to HTML

included_use_cases.name: Navigate Docs Sidebar
included_use_cases.description: Sidebar included in both tutorials index and detail pages; lists all tutorials + skill categories with current-page highlighting

key_components.name: server/index.js
key_components.role: HTTP router (Bun serve). Routes /tutorials and /tutorials/:slug to serveGenerated(). Calls generateSubPages() at startup.

key_components.name: serveGenerated(pagePath)
key_components.role: Helper: reads pre-built HTML file via Bun file(), returns Response with security headers or 404

key_components.name: generateSubPages(rootDir)
key_components.role: Build-time generator. Calls buildSubPageData(), then renders and writes all tutorial HTML files to public/tutorials/

key_components.name: renderTutorialsIndexMain(tutorials)
key_components.role: Renders tutorial card grid HTML from tutorial metadata (slug, order, title, tagline)

key_components.name: renderTutorialDetail(tutorial, knownSkillIds)
key_components.role: Renders individual tutorial article: header (eyebrow breadcrumb, title, tagline) + prose section from renderMarkdown(tutorial.body)

key_components.name: renderDocsSidebar(skillsByCategory, tutorials, current)
key_components.role: Renders shared docs sidebar with tutorial links + skill category groups; marks current page with aria-current

key_components.name: wrapInDocsLayout(sidebarHtml, mainHtml)
key_components.role: Wraps sidebar + main content in .skills-layout div shell

key_components.name: renderPage({title, description, bodyHtml, ...})
key_components.role: Wraps content in full HTML document shell with <head>, meta tags, nav, scripts

key_components.name: renderMarkdown(markdown, opts)
key_components.role: Converts tutorial markdown body to HTML using marked with custom renderer (createRenderer). Resolves skill cross-links and heading anchors.

key_components.name: buildSubPageData(rootDir)
key_components.role: Loads tutorial data (slugs, titles, body markdown, order) and skill data from source files

build_flow: generateSubPages(rootDir) called at server startup (server/index.js line 24)
Tutorials index: renderDocsSidebar() + renderTutorialsIndexMain() → wrapInDocsLayout() → renderPage() → writes public/tutorials/index.html
Tutorial detail pages (one per tutorial): renderDocsSidebar(current={kind:'tutorial',slug}) + renderTutorialDetail() → wrapInDocsLayout() → renderPage() → writes public/tutorials/{slug}.html
key_relationships: server/index.js uses serveGenerated to serve pre-built tutorial HTML
security_notes: Slug sanitized: req.params.slug.replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/gi, ''). Path traversal guarded by serveGenerated() existence check. Response headers include X-Content-Type-Options and X-Frame-Options: DENY.
